zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Elinor Levett於1581年7月3日出生在英國越可爾約克時，她的父親Percival Leavitt I30歲，母親Elizabeth Rotherforth20歲。她於1593年與John Hawkins在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1639年10月12日在英國英格蘭越可爾可廷加姆享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Elinor Levett于1581年7月3日出生在英国越可爾約克时，她的父亲Percival Leavitt I30岁，母亲Elizabeth Rotherforth20岁。她于1593年与John Hawkins在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1639年10月12日在英国英格兰越可爾可廷加姆享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Levett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leavitt
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French leuet ‘wolf cub’ (see Low 3).
habitational name from any of various places in Normandy called Livet. All are of obscure, presumably Gaulish, etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Elinor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Elinor Levett was born on 3 July 1581, in York, Yorkshire, England, her father, Percival Leavitt I, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Rotherforth, was 20. She married John Hawkins in 1593, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 12 October 1639, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Elinor Levett est née le 3 juillet 1581, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Percival Leavitt I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Rotherforth, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Hawkins en 1593, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1639, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Elinor Levett am 3. Juli 1581 in York, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Percival Leavitt I 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Rotherforth 20. Sie hat 1593 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom John Hawkins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1639 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Elinor Levett è nata il il 3 luglio 1581 nel York, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Percival Leavitt I, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Rotherforth, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Hawkins nel 1593, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1639, nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Elinor Levettが1581年7月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父Percival Leavitt Iは30歳，母Elizabeth Rotherforthは20歳であった。1593年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでJohn Hawkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1639年10月12日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Elinor Levett(이)가 1581년 7월 3일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Percival Leavitt I(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Rotherforth(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1593년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 John Hawkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 July 1581–12 October 1639: 3 de julho de 1581–12 de outubro de 1639
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Elinor Levett nasceu em 3 de julho de 1581, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Percival Leavitt I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Rotherforth, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hawkins em 1593, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1639, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Elinor Levett родилась 3 июля 1581 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Percival Leavitt I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Rotherforth, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hawkins в 1593 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 12 октября 1639 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.3 July 1581–12 October 1639: 3 de julio de 1581–12 de octubre de 1639
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Elinor Levett nació el 3 de julio de 1581, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Percival Leavitt I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Rotherforth, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Hawkins en 1593, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1639, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
